questionHtml: Suggest two problems that could be caused by the presence of biofilms in water systems.
markschemeHtml:
a. contamination/pollution «of water system»

    OR

    «microbial growth of biofilm» causes disease through water systems

b. difficult to eliminate «from water systems»

c. fouling/clogging of water pipes

d. corrosion of water pipes

OWTTE

[Max 2 Marks]

meta.title: Suggest two problems that could be caused by the presence of biofilms in water systems.
